title: Write Inline Comments
description: Add comments that explain why, not what.
content:
Add helpful comments to this code:

```
{{code}}
```

Comment the WHY, not the what — explain intent, non-obvious decisions, tricky edge cases, and references to relevant context (tickets, specs, gotchas). Do NOT narrate code that already reads clearly. If a comment would only exist because the code is unclear, suggest renaming/restructuring instead. Keep them concise.
